dimensions.label: Physical Environment
dimensions.description: Comfort with shared-home conditions such as noise, room temperature, and lighting.

dimensions.label: Social Energy
dimensions.description: Preference for shared activities roommate connection and home socializing.

dimensions.label: Daily Routine
dimensions.description: Preference for predictable study sleep work and daily schedules.

dimensions.label: Cultural Openness
dimensions.description: Comfort with different backgrounds foods languages traditions and routines.

dimensions.label: Household Order
dimensions.description: Preference for cleanliness chores shared supplies and common area standards.

dimensions.label: Personal Boundaries
dimensions.description: Preference for privacy personal belongings private time and visitor boundaries.

dimensions.label: Communication Style
dimensions.description: Preferred approach for raising concerns discussing problems and repairing misunderstandings.

dimensions.label: Rule Flexibility
dimensions.description: Preference for fixed agreements versus adapting household expectations to circumstances.
